0.text: Fullness in the anterior aspect of the right main bronchus at the hilum

1.text: Accumulation of secretions within the bronchial lumens of the right lower lobe

2.text: Increased density consistent with fibrosis in bilateral upper lobe apical segments

3.text: Areas of linear atelectasis in the right middle lobe and basal segments of the lower lobe

4.text: Multiple non-specific subcentimeter nodules within the lung parenchyma

5.text: Largest nodule measuring 5 mm in diameter in the minor fissure of the right upper lobe
